Tests and build scripts for health, launcher, timeline, weather, and workout system applications.

## Folders
- **[health](health/README.md)**: Tests for rendering health-related cards and views in various data scenarios, and a build script.
- **[launcher](launcher/README.md)**: Unit tests for the launcher menu layer and build script for launcher app tests.
- **[timeline](timeline/README.md)**: Tests and build script for the timeline app in Pebble firmware, including list view and no events scenarios.
- **[weather](weather/README.md)**: Tests for weather app layouts and build script for compiling and testing in Pebble firmware.
- **[workout](workout/README.md)**: Tests and build script for workout system applications in the Pebble firmware.
